name: Smash Cars
description: Set on a beautiful resort island, the fast-paced, bumper car gameplay transforms the relaxing setting into a frenzied raceway.
requirements:
Minimum:

  • OS: Windows
  • Processor: Intel
  • Memory: 1024 MB RAM
  • Graphics: 256 MB DirectX 9.0c compatible graphics card (shader model 3)
  • DirectX®: 9.0c
  • Hard Drive: 300 MB HD space
  • Sound: DirectX 9.0c compatible
comment1: Very Solid classic. I used to play this on my PS3. for 10 dollars it is worth however I the game is surprisingly short.. I always found it weird how you could hover over "location" when selecting your map/stage. there is only ONE location in the game and it is fire. I wonder if more locations were planned then scrapped or just a strange menu choice.. Either way highly recommend but be warned this game is quite short
